reason: Enabling FIPS mode on an already installed RHEL 9 system requires adding the dracut fips module and setting the kernel boot parameter fips=1, which is not supported post‑installation and can render the system unbootable or cause cryptographic failures. This change impacts core cryptographic behavior and boot process, posing a high risk of lockout or system breakage.
estimated_impact: reboot required; FIPS mode activation; kernel boot parameter modification; potential system unbootability; cryptographic subsystem changes
